#### \
Authors: *Brian Schilder, Jack Humphrey, Towfique Raj*\

##### \
README updated: *Mar-16-2026*\

## `echoannot`: Echoverse module: Functions for annotating genomic data

with annotations and epigenomic data.

This R package is part of the *echoverse* suite that supports
[`echolocatoR`](https://github.com/RajLabMSSM/echolocatoR): an automated
genomic fine-mapping pipeline.

If you use `echoannot`, please cite:

> Brian M Schilder, Jack Humphrey, Towfique Raj (2021). echolocatoR: an
> automated end-to-end statistical and functional genomic fine-mapping
> pipeline. Bioinformatics, btab658.
> <https://doi.org/10.1093/bioinformatics/btab658>

## Installation

``` r

if(!require("BiocManager")) install.packages("BiocManager")

BiocManager::install("RajLabMSSM/echoannot")
library(echoannot)
```

## Documentation

### [Website](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot)

### [Getting started](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/articles/echoannot)

## Datasets

For more detailed information about each dataset, use `?`:\
`R library(echolocatoR) ?NOTT_2019.interactome # example dataset`

### Epigenomic & genome-wide annotations

#### [Nott et al. (2019)](https://science.sciencemag.org/content/366/6469/1134.abstract)

- Data from this publication contains results from cell type-specific
  (neurons, oligodendrocytes, astrocytes, microglia, & peripheral
  myeloid cells) epigenomic assays (H3K27ac, ATAC, H3K4me3) from human
  brain tissue.

- For detailed metadata, see:

  ``` r

  data("NOTT_2019.bigwig_metadata")
  ```

- Built-in datasets:

  - Enhancer/promoter coordinates (as *GenomicRanges*)

  ``` r

  data("NOTT_2019.interactome")
  # Examples of the data nested in "NOTT_2019.interactome" object:
  NOTT_2019.interactome$`Neuronal promoters`
  NOTT_2019.interactome$`Neuronal enhancers`
  NOTT_2019.interactome$`Microglia promoters`
  NOTT_2019.interactome$`Microglia enhancers`
  ...
  ...
  ```

  - PLAC-seq enhancer-promoter interactome coordinates

  ``` r

  NOTT_2019.interactome$H3K4me3_around_TSS_annotated_pe
  NOTT_2019.interactome$`Microglia interactome`
  NOTT_2019.interactome$`Neuronal interactome`
  NOTT_2019.interactome$`Oligo interactome`
  ...
  ...
  ```

- API access to full bigWig files on UCSC Genome Browser, which includes

  - Epigenomic reads (as *GenomicRanges*)\
  - Aggregate epigenomic *score* for each cell type - assay combination

#### [Corces et al. (2020)](https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2020.01.06.896159v1)

- Data from this preprint contains results from bulk and single-cell
  chromatin accessibility epigenomic assays in 39 human brains.

  ``` r

  data("CORCES_2020.bulkATACseq_peaks")
  data("CORCES_2020.cicero_coaccessibility")
  data("CORCES_2020.HiChIP_FitHiChIP_loop_calls")
  data("CORCES_2020.scATACseq_celltype_peaks")
  data("CORCES_2020.scATACseq_peaks")
  ```

#### [XGR](http://xgr.r-forge.r-project.org)

- API access to a diverse library of cell type/line-specific epigenomic
  (e.g. ENCODE) and other genome-wide annotations.

#### [Roadmap](http://www.roadmapepigenomics.org)

- API access to cell type-specific epigenomic data.

#### [biomaRt](https://bioconductor.org/packages/release/bioc/html/biomaRt.html)

- API access to various genome-wide SNP annotations (e.g. missense,
  nonsynonmous, intronic, enhancer).

#### [HaploR](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/haploR/vignettes/haplor-vignette.html)

- API access to known per-SNP QTL and epigenomic data hits.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Brian M. Schilder, Bioinformatician
II](https://bschilder.github.io/BMSchilder/)\
[Raj Lab](https://rajlab.org)\
[Department of Neuroscience, Icahn School of Medicine at Mount
Sinai](https://icahn.mssm.edu/about/departments-offices/neuroscience)

# Package index

## Annotation functions

Annotate SNPs with functional information

- [`annotate_snps()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/annotate_snps.md)
  : Annotate merged fine-mapping results from all loci
- [`annotate_missense()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/annotate_missense.md)
  : Annotate any missense variants
- [`annotation_file_name()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/annotation_file_name.md)
  : Annotation file name

## NOTT2019 data

Brain cell-type-specific epigenomic data from Nott et al. 2019

- [`NOTT2019_epigenomic_histograms()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/NOTT2019_epigenomic_histograms.md)
  : Plot brain cell-specific epigenomic data
- [`NOTT2019_get_epigenomic_peaks()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/NOTT2019_get_epigenomic_peaks.md)
  : Download cell type-specific epigenomic peaks
- [`NOTT2019_get_interactome()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/NOTT2019_get_interactome.md)
  : Import cell type-specific interactomes
- [`NOTT2019_get_promoter_interactome_data()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/NOTT2019_get_promoter_interactome_data.md)
  : Get cell type-specific promoter/emhancer/interactome data
- [`NOTT2019_get_regulatory_regions()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/NOTT2019_get_regulatory_regions.md)
  : Get regulatory regions: Nott2019
- [`NOTT2019_plac_seq_plot()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/NOTT2019_plac_seq_plot.md)
  : Plot brain cell-specific interactome data
- [`get_NOTT2019_superenhancer_interactome()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/get_NOTT2019_superenhancer_interactome.md)
  : Brain cell type-specific interactomes with superenhancers

## CORCES2020 data

Single-cell epigenomic data from Corces et al. 2020

- [`CORCES2020_get_ATAC_peak_overlap()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/CORCES2020_get_ATAC_peak_overlap.md)
  : Get overlap between datatable of SNPs and scATAC peaks
- [`CORCES2020_get_hichip_fithichip_overlap()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/CORCES2020_get_hichip_fithichip_overlap.md)
  : Get overlap between data table of SNPs and HiChIP_FitHiChIP
  coaccessibility anchors
- [`get_CORCES2020_bulkATACseq_peaks()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/get_CORCES2020_bulkATACseq_peaks.md)
  : bulkATACseq peaks from human brain tissue
- [`get_CORCES2020_cicero_coaccessibility()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/get_CORCES2020_cicero_coaccessibility.md)
  : Cicero_coaccessibility from human brain tissue
- [`get_CORCES2020_hichip_fithichip_loop_calls()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/get_CORCES2020_hichip_fithichip_loop_calls.md)
  : FitHiChIP loop calls from human brain tissue
- [`get_CORCES2020_scATACseq_celltype_peaks()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/get_CORCES2020_scATACseq_celltype_peaks.md)
  : scATACseq cell type-specific peaks from human brain tissue
- [`get_CORCES2020_scATACseq_peaks()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/get_CORCES2020_scATACseq_peaks.md)
  : scATACseq peaks from human brain tissue

## GOSHIFTER

GoShifter enrichment analysis

- [`GOSHIFTER()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/GOSHIFTER.md)
  : Run GoShifter enrichment pipeline
- [`GOSHIFTER_run()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/GOSHIFTER_run.md)
  : Run GoShifter enrichment test
- [`GOSHIFTER_heatmap()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/GOSHIFTER_heatmap.md)
  : GoShifter enrichment heatmap
- [`GOSHIFTER_histograms_SNPgroups()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/GOSHIFTER_histograms_SNPgroups.md)
  : GoShifter SNP-group histograms
- [`GOSHIFTER_histograms_pvals()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/GOSHIFTER_histograms_pvals.md)
  : GoShifter p-value histograms

## MOTIFBREAKR

Motif disruption analysis

- [`MOTIFBREAKR()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/MOTIFBREAKR.md)
  :

  Run motifbreakR

- [`MOTIFBREAKR_calc_pvals()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/MOTIFBREAKR_calc_pvals.md)
  :

  Calculate motifbreakR p-values

- [`MOTIFBREAKR_filter()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/MOTIFBREAKR_filter.md)
  :

  Merge and filter motifbreakR + echolocatoR results

- [`MOTIFBREAKR_plot()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/MOTIFBREAKR_plot.md)
  :

  Plot motifbreakR results

- [`MOTIFBREAKR_summarize()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/MOTIFBREAKR_summarize.md)
  :

  Summarize motifbreakR + echolocatoR results

## XGR

Genomic region annotation via XGR

- [`XGR_enrichment()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/XGR_enrichment.md)
  : XGR enrichment
- [`XGR_filter_assays()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/XGR_filter_assays.md)
  : Filter assays
- [`XGR_filter_sources()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/XGR_filter_sources.md)
  : Filter sources
- [`XGR_query()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/xgr_query.md)
  : Download, standardize, and merge XGR annotations

## ROADMAP

Roadmap Epigenomics chromatin state annotations

- [`ROADMAP_construct_reference()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/ROADMAP_construct_reference.md)
  : Gather Roadmap annotation metadata
- [`ROADMAP_query()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/ROADMAP_query.md)
  : Query Roadmap Query Roadmap annotations using a set of genomic
  coordinates.

## Plotting

Summary and visualization functions

- [`CS_bin_plot()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/CS_bin_plot.md)
  : Plot CS bin counts
- [`CS_counts_plot()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/CS_counts_plot.md)
  : Bar plot of tool-specific CS sizes
- [`super_summary_plot()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/super_summary_plot.md)
  : Merge all summary plots into one super plot
- [`peak_overlap_plot()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/peak_overlap_plot.md)
  : Plot overlap between some SNP group and various epigenomic data
- [`plot_dataset_overlap()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/plot_dataset_overlap.md)
  : Plot inter-study SNP overlap
- [`plot_missense()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/plot_missense.md)
  : Plot any missense variants
- [`convert_plots()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/convert_plots.md)
  : Convert plots to various formats
- [`merge_celltype_specific_epigenomics()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/merge_celltype_specific_epigenomics.md)
  : Merge all cell-type-specific epigenomics

## Utilities

Helper functions

- [`add_mb()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/add_mb.md)
  : Add Mb

- [`granges_overlap()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/granges_overlap.md)
  :

  Find GenomicRanges overlap Find overlap genomic position overlap
  between two
  [GRanges](https://rdrr.io/pkg/GenomicRanges/man/GRanges-class.html)
  objects.

- [`get_window_limits()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/get_window_limits.md)
  : Get widow limits

- [`import_ucsc_bigwigs()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/import_ucsc_bigwigs.md)
  : Import bigwig files from the UCSC Genome Browser

- [`test_enrichment()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/test_enrichment.md)
  : Test enrichment

- [`annotation_file_name()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/annotation_file_name.md)
  : Annotation file name

## Bundled data

- [`NOTT2019_bigwig_metadata`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/NOTT2019_bigwig_metadata.md)
  : Metadata and links to data
- [`xgr_example`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/xgr_example.md)
  : Example XGR query
- [`XGR_enrichment_bootstrap()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoannot/reference/XGR_enrichment_bootstrap.md)
  : XGR enrichment (bootstrapped)
